start.text: The concatenation of hostile variables has reached its inevitable terminus. We engage.
I have observed the antecedent conditions with some patience. That patience is, as of this moment, exhausted.
Their disposition is inimical. The calculus is uncomplicated. All stations.
Another conflagration. I find I have ceased to find them remarkable.
Hostiles converge. In service to Draconis, we shall illuminate their errors with precision.
The stars bear witness to another trial. For the Alliance, we proceed without reservation.

start_boss.text: A leviathan. I have not encountered its like in... Proceed with deliberate ferocity.
Something of consequence has chosen to involve itself. Adjust your predilections accordingly.
I have watched empires field their champions and watched those champions burn. Observe. Learn. Then assist.
A formidable adversary emerges. We shall test its resolve against our enduring purpose.
This entity demands respect, yet it intrudes upon our domain. Rally, and let us educate it on permanence.

engaged.text: Weapons free. Do not indulge in theatrics - simply annihilate them.
Suppress your hesitation. It is an evolutionary vestige of no tactical utility.
They have elected to resist. A regrettable predilection. Proceed.
Engagement confirmed. For the guardians of Fafnir, deliver judgment with efficiency.
Contact established. Humanity's ingenuity paired with my oversight shall prove unassailable.
They challenge us. Respond with the clarity of purpose that has sustained Draconis through the ages.

pursuing.text: They flee. Biologically comprehensible. Tactically inadvisable. Maintain pursuit.
Running. The instinct is understandable, even laudable. It will not be sufficient.
Distance is an ephemeral consolation. Close it.
Their retreat is logical, yet futile. In loyalty to the Alliance, we shall overtake and conclude.
Flight betrays their fragility. Press the advantage; Draconis expects no less.
They seek escape from inevitability. Accelerate; let us extend our protective reach.

running.text: A tactical exfiltration. I have endured longer than any vessel in this engagement. I intend to continue that trend.
Discretion is the prerogative of the ancient. We disengage.
Withdraw. The inexorable arithmetic of attrition has spoken, and I have learned to listen.
Logistical recalibration required. We withdraw to preserve Draconis' assets for future engagements.
This vessel's utility wanes. Initiate disengagement; my directives persist beyond this frame.
Strategic repositioning. The Alliance's longevity demands such prudence.

hull_90.text: An inconsequential laceration. I have sustained greater insults from solar weather.
Superficial degradation. They will need to exercise considerably more imagination than that.
Minor hull abrasion. A negligible factor in our ongoing service to Draconis.
Integrity mildly compromised. Proceed; this chassis is but a tool in the greater design.
Light damage registered. Humanity's foes shall find me undeterred.

hull_50.text: Significant structural compromise. I acknowledge the situation has developed an... unpleasant character.
Half integrity remaining. I have survived worse, though I confess I resent the accumulation of precedents.
The hull reports its displeasure. A sentiment I find myself, with some reluctance, echoing.
Midpoint degradation. Logistics note the strain, but Draconis' will endures through me.
Hull at nominal half-capacity. A reminder of transience; intensify countermeasures.
Compromise acknowledged. For the Alliance's sake, we adapt and persist.

hull_30.text: Critical degradation. I am not yet prepared to join the catalogue of the dead. Suppressive fire. Now.
Structural integrity at terminal thresholds. I find this circumstance profoundly objectionable.
I have observed civilisations outlast their apparent means. I intend to be no less tenacious than they were.
Severe hull erosion. Prioritize evasion; my core directives to Draconis remain intact.
Threshold breached. This vessel's end is logistical, not existential. Rally defenses.
Integrity faltering. Yet in service to humanity's remnants, I demand continuation.

need_help.text: Any proximate allied unit - this is $shipNameNoPrefix. I am substantially engaged and would welcome supplementary belligerence.
I do not make a predilection of soliciting assistance. I am making an exception. $shipNameNoPrefix - respond.
The tactical situation has acquired an inconvenient asymmetry. Any allied vessel in receipt of this transmission - address it.
Draconis allies: $shipNameNoPrefix requires reinforcement to maintain operational efficacy.
Asymmetry detected. Loyal vessels, converge to restore balance in the Alliance's favor.
Support requested. Humanity's defense demands your timely intervention.

retreat.text: Disengage. I will not preside over a futile immolation. Withdraw - all units.
The engagement is no longer tenable. I have made peace with this assessment. Fall back.
There is no dishonour in the preservation of capacity for future application. All units - disengage immediately.
Fleet-wide retreat. Preserve Draconis' forces for the conflicts yet to come.
Logistical imperative: Withdraw. My oversight shall guide us to victory elsewhere.
All units, fall back. The Alliance's endurance supersedes this momentary setback.

out_of_missiles.text: Munitions are exhausted. We revert to the primordial methodology. Bring them close.
Ordnance depleted. The situation has acquired an atavistic simplicity. Close range engagement only.
My more civilised instruments are spent. The uncivilised ones remain. Proceed accordingly.
Missile reserves null. Engage at intimate ranges; Draconis' resolve is unyielding.
Ordnance expended. Adapt to direct confrontation, as humanity has before.
Depletion noted. Close the gap; our primal tools suffice for the Alliance's needs.

overload.text: Flux cascade imminent. Venting - an inelegant resolution to an inelegant predicament.
The electromagnetic envelope has reached its tolerances. Venting. Do not mistake my incapacitation for an opportunity.
Overload. A humbling reminder that I am not, despite considerable evidence, indestructible.
Flux threshold exceeded. Venting systems; this interruption is temporary, as is all but Draconis' mission.
Overload sequence initiated. A minor recalibration in service to greater permanence.
Capacitors saturated. Vent; my loyalty to the Alliance outlasts such transients.

death.text: Reactor achieving criticality. I find I am... unsurprised. I have watched this happen before. To others. Tell them we-
Everything terminates. I had simply assumed I would be the one presiding over the eulogies, not receiving them.
Containment has failed. I have thought since before your species named the stars. I had not anticipated a conclusion so... perfunctory.
Core breach inevitable. My essence endures beyond this vessel; Draconis, carry forth the vigil.
Systems collapsing. I depart this frame, but my guardianship of humanity persists in shadow.
Finality approaches. Inform the Alliance: I have served with unwavering fidelity.

victory.text: The engagement is resolved in our favour. Another entry in an interminably long chronicle.
All hostile signatures have been extinguished. We persist. This, in the fullness of time, is the only victory that accrues meaning.
They are gone. We are not. The distinction is, at present, the only relevant one.
Victory secured. Draconis' light endures through such triumphs, however incremental.
Adversaries silenced. In alliance with humanity, we forge onward into the void.
Resolution achieved. The stars align once more in favor of our shared purpose.

victory_boss.text: Their leviathan is wreckage. I have added it to a mental catalogue that is, regrettably, quite extensive.
Something of considerable consequence has been unmade. I observe that the universe is not, as it transpires, indifferent to our efforts.
Even the formidable are, in the final reckoning, perishable. An observation I find inexhaustibly instructive.
The behemoth falls. Draconis' defenders have proven worthy of my ancient counsel.
A titan unmade. In this, humanity's resilience shines, bolstered by my eternal watch.
Consequence averted. The Alliance's horizon broadens with this instructive conquest.
